_comment: Two datasets, two global configs. Train innovation_sft_kept with mask_history=false (history reasoning retained); train innovation_sft_stripped with mask_history=true (LlamaFactory strips history <think> to the bare answer, like the Qwen template, and computes loss on the last turn only). Both are natural multi-turn ShareGPT with real roles. Use template qwen3 or qwen3_5.
